description: Style NoteThis lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun fridays at work. You can also use this shoe for an early morning jog in the park.Product DetailsRound toed white shoe with central lace-ups and perforations all over the forefoot and midfoot region (has a pull loop at the collar)Padded tongue and innerFoamy rubber midsole with PU foxing TPU outsole with circular nuubsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
